name: Banana Ginger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch square pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, beat sugar and margarine until well blended.
4. Add mashed bananas, vanilla, and egg; mix well.
5. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, and 2 teaspoons ginger to the mixture; mix until moistened.
6. Add milk; mix well. Pour batter into sprayed pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool slightly.
8. In a small bowl, combine all topping ingredients; mix gently.
9. Cut cake into squares. Serve warm or cool topped with whipped topping mixture. Makes 9 servings.
